marshallese.same_dots_just_turned_sideways_learn_o: Dots ko wōt, ukōt wōt. Katak juon fact, jeḷā ruo.
marshallese.this_is_one_of_the_tricky_15_facts_the: Eñin juon iaan Tricky 15 facts — set eo edik me ej aikuj recall ṃool. Oktak ñan Practice → "Tricky 15" mode ñan drill.
marshallese.same_numbers_four_faces_knowing_one_fa: Numbers ko wōt, emān mejān. Jeḷā juon fact ej lewōj ko jet.
marshallese.pick_a_pattern_to_highlight_the_table_: 🔍 Kāālōt juon pattern ñan highlight. Table eo eobrak kōn structure — ñe kwōj loe, jimattan facts rej erom predictable.
marshallese.click_any_pattern_above_to_light_up_th: 👆 Kalpin jabdewōt pattern ilōñ ñan kabōlbōl cells im riiti rule eo. Elōñ patterns remaroñ overlap (waanjoñak, 5×5 ej "5s multiple" im "perfect square" karaji.).
marshallese.why_patterns_beat_brute_memorization: 💡 Etke patterns rej anjọ jān brute memorization
marshallese.you_only_need_to_memorize_about_a_thir: Kwōj aikuj wōt memorize enañin juon ṃōttan jilu in table eo.
marshallese.anything_in_the_1s_2s_5s_10s_11s_colum: Jabdewōt ilo 1s, 2s, 5s, 10s, 11s columns ewōr juon rule epidodo. Squares ej juon set edik (12 facts). Men eo ej pād wōt ej "tricky middle" — enañin 15 facts — me ej aikuj recall ṃool: 6×7, 6×8, 6×9, 7×8, 7×9, 8×9 im twins ko aer.
marshallese.forget_7_8_7_8_5_8_2_8_40_16_56_build_: Kwōj meḷọkḷọk 7×8? 7×8 = 5×8 + 2×8 = 40 + 16 = 56. Kalōk fact eo epen jān ruo repidodo. Ālikin bwe elōñ repetitions, answer eo ej erom automatic.
marshallese.visualizing_each_fact_as_an_area_model: Visualize kajjojo fact āinwōt juon area-model rectangle (Visual tab) ak juon pattern (tab in) ej lewōj juon iaḷ ñan answer eo me ejjab aikuj automatic recall. Recall ej wōr tokālik, ak jab jān drilling wōt.
marshallese.each_cell_a_multiplication_fact_color_: Kajjojo cell = juon multiplication fact. Color = mastery eo aṃ ñan kiiō. Kalpin jabdewōt cell ñan drill fact eṇ.
marshallese.fact_family_same_numbers_four_faces: 👨‍👩‍👧 Fact family — numbers ko wōt, emān mejān
marshallese.sliders_for_mastery_threshold_and_sele: Sliders ñan mastery threshold im selected factor. Discrete 3-state outcome. Ejjeḷọk score, ejjeḷọk reveal.
marshallese.hypothesis_how_does_threshold_change_f: Hypothesis: Ewi wāween an threshold ukōt feedback ñan ri-katak ro rej pen?
marshallese.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 Kwōj jaḷ — kwaḷọk prompts ko rōpeḷḷọk
marshallese.what_if_mastery_100_what_gets_praised: Ta eḷaññe mastery = 100%? Ta eo ej bōk nōbar?
marshallese.how_does_color_coding_affect_motivatio: Ewi wāween an color-coding jelōt motivation?
marshallese.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Ij meḷeḷe — kōmḷeḷeik ilo naan ko aṃ
marshallese.design_note_discrete_3_state_mastery_m: Design note: discrete 3-state mastery marker; ejjeḷọk raw score; ejjeḷọk reveal — by design.
